title: Login screen in admin panel
description: Build the login screen in `apps/admin`: email/password form calling `auth.login`, redirecting to the admin dashboard on success and showing inline errors on failure.
acceptanceCriteria: `/login` route renders an email and password field and a submit button
Submitting valid credentials calls `auth.login` and redirects to the admin home route on success
Submitting invalid credentials shows an inline error message without page reload
Submit button is disabled while the request is in flight, showing a loading state
Already-authenticated users visiting `/login` are redirected to the admin home route

steps.description: Set up admin panel routing shell
steps.details: In `apps/admin`, add a router (e.g. React Router or TanStack Router) with a public `/login` route and a protected layout for all other routes.
Create `apps/admin/src/features/auth/LoginForm.tsx` with controlled email/password inputs, client-side required-field validation, and a submit handler calling the tRPC `auth.login` mutation.
Disable the submit button and show a spinner while the mutation is pending. On `UNAUTHORIZED` error, display 'Email ou senha inválidos' below the form without clearing the email field.

steps.description: Redirect on success and guard the route
steps.details: On successful login, navigate to the admin home route. Add a route guard that redirects authenticated users away from `/login` and unauthenticated users away from protected routes (checking a lightweight `auth.me`-style query or cached login state).
Using Playwright, script: navigate to `/login`, submit wrong credentials and assert the error message renders, submit correct bootstrap admin credentials and assert redirect to the admin home route.

technicalNotes: This task depends on `auth.login` (TASK-10) existing on the server; the admin panel's tRPC client setup itself may need a minimal bootstrap if not already scaffolded in TASK-2.
